noticias.titulo: Prediction: Apple Stock Will Crush the S&P 500 in Its New CEO’s First Year
noticias.resumen: John Ternus is stepping into the Apple CEO role at a moment that could define the company's next decade, but whether his product instincts and a bold on-device AI strategy are enough to outrun the broader market is far from a settled question.
